data.name: Elf World Adventure 6
data.detailed_description:
GAMEPLAY:

Elf World Adventure 6 is the next installment in the erotic anime-style puzzle series where you’ll meet even more enchanting elf girls in a magical fantasy setting. Solve puzzles to unlock beautiful illustrations, relax with soothing music, and choose your challenge — go Easy for a laid-back experience or Hard for a real test of skill.

FEATURES:

  • New levels featuring charming elf girls in fantasy outfits
  • Difficulty selection: Easy and Hard modes
  • Steam achievements to decorate your profile
  • A cozy atmosphere with gentle music and beautiful illustrations
  • Simple controls and accessible gameplay

data.short_description: Relaxing anime-style puzzle game featuring beautiful elf girls, unlockable illustrations, and difficulty options.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 保加利亞文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 匈牙利文, 越南文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2300
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-7400 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 960 or Radeon R9 380X
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
